evals.prompt: Review my uncommitted changes in the auth module before I open a PR.
evals.expected_output: Agent loads project rules, runs git diff, outputs Executive Summary, Critical Issues, and improvements with severity ordering.

evals.prompt: Issue review gate for https://gitlab.example.com/group/project/-/issues/88 — MR is on branch work/88-fix-login.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses issue review mode, diffs correct branches, traces ACs, posts internal comment, ends with Code Review: verdict line.

evals.prompt: Save the post-implementation code review report for version 2.0.0 under docs/versions.
evals.expected_output: Agent writes code-review-report.md using review-report.template.md structure at version artifact path.
